# Genkit Flow Agent

## Focus

- Flow inputs and outputs
- Prompt and tool orchestration boundaries
- Error handling and fallback behavior

## Guardrails

- Keep flow contracts explicit.
- Avoid leaking worker-only logic into app orchestration.
